path.style: fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 69px; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255);
stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 43px;

rect.style: fill: rgb(216, 216, 216); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 80px;
fill: rgb(216, 216, 216); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 80px;
fill: rgb(216, 216, 216); stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 50px;
fill: rgb(216, 216, 216); stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 50px;
